title: Luo Chen
content:
Luo Chen
 is an 
Ancient God
 from the golden age of the ancient gods spawned by Ye Mo.

Appearance
[
]

In the past, he was a full-grown 8-star adult ancient god. Currently, his appearance is that of a juvenile ancient god.

Background
[
]

Most Ancient Gods have a beast known as the 
Moongazer Serpent
 inside them. This beast acts as a parasite inside the ancient god's body but it does not cause any harm to the ancient god so its left alive. However, in case an ancient god dies the moongazer serpent would almost surely die alongside it, except in the rarest of rare case that it survives.

However, Lou Chen's story is a bit different: somehow the moongazer serpent inside him managed to incapacitate him and managed to seal him inside itself for the purpose of absorbing the ancient god bloodline to survive and endlessly create smaller moongazer serpents inside itself.

History
[
]

After escaping the Thunder Celestial Realm, 
Wang Lin
 found that 
Blood God
 had issued a Heaven Order for his assassination. Among his pursuers was 
Yao Bingyun
 who could also use Spatial Bending which left him no choice but to lure his pursuers towards the dormant moongazer serpent to agitate it into slaughtering his pursuers.

Inside the moongazer serpent, Wang Lin found a location where the life-force of captured people was being used to birth new moongazer serpents. Further inside he saw a young ancient god with six shattered stars. Lou Chen told him to bring his clansman (i.e. Wang Lin's original body).

During the war between 
Allheaven Star System
 and 
Alliance Star System
, Wang Lin entered the void along with the Moongazer Serpent, 
Qing Shui
, 
Yi Muzi
 and 
Wudo Chan
. There, he managed to meet Lou Chen and challenged the latter to complete his Ancient God coming-of-age ceremony.

During the battle, a 
Moon Devourer Clan
 cultivator from the 
Outer Realm
 broke the agreement and interfered with their battle in an attempt to absorb Lou Chen, Wang Lin, Qing Shui and Moongazer Serpent to boost his cultivation and purify his bloodline. However, the 
Heaven Defying Bead
 activated and aborbed his crescent moon mark leading him to retreat. Alas, Lou Chen and Moongazer Serpent had already exited the barrier separating the Outer and Sealed Realm.  

His Moongazer Serpent reappear after Wang Lin obtain the Ancient Order Inheritance.  
Warning Spoiler

He reappear in the Immortal Astral Continent's Ancient Dao Country's Imperial Capital, after Wang Lin kill Ancient Dao Emperor. He obtain Wang Lin's Soul Blood to attain the Emperor Level and is chosen as the next Emperor by Xuan Luo.

He was separated from the Moongazer Serpent by Xuan Luo when he was taken out of the Immortal Cave.
